name: Susan Lee
affiliation: Alliance for Community Preservation and Betterment (founder)
quote: 1.2 million New Yorkers are locked out of the primary. As Americans, we need to do better.

name: Melanie Wesslock
affiliation: One City Rising
quote: I had to register for a party that I do not want to be in in order to have a vote in our primaries... and I think that is insane.

name: Sam Panuccio
affiliation: Retired NYPD (39 years); member of three police unions
quote: Just as unions help ensure that workers have a voice in the workplace, our election system... should ensure that every voter has a voice in our democracy.

name: Maria Danzilo
affiliation: One City Rising (Executive Director)
quote: The main effect of moving to an open primary, followed by a top two election would be to give unaffiliated voters the ability to participate in the primary process...

name: Jessica Haller
affiliation: Political consultant; advisory board, GoVoteNYC; former executive director, The New Majority NYC
quote: Open primary districts generally have twice the turnout that we do here. And since this is also an efficiency discussion, election processes are much more efficient.

name: Dr. Jessie Fields
affiliation: Harlem community physician (Mount Sinai); NYC Maternal Mortality Review Committee; board member, Open Primaries
quote: The disenfranchisement of 1.2 million New Yorkers, a majority of whom are black, Hispanic, and Asian, must end.

name: Alan Cox
affiliation: Community health outreach worker with COPE (Coalition on Positive Health Empowerment); Bronx resident; independent voter
quote: We have a system where 1.2 million folks who are independents are shut out of voting in the primaries. And that's where most decisions are made.

name: Frank Morano
affiliation: New York City Council Member, Staten Island South Shore (testified online)
quote: A lot of times it feels like you need a decoder ring to determine how you vote in any given election.

name: Jeremy Gruber
affiliation: Senior Vice President, Open Primaries (national organization); lawyer and election law expert
quote: Why Washington, D.C., and why not New York City?

name: Martha Snow
affiliation: Urban Design Forum (Director of Community Design)
quote: Activating a public space means navigating a fragmented maze... with no uniform process and no single point of accountability.

name: Robert Brunotte
affiliation: Construction & General Building Laborers' Local 79 (LIUNA)
quote: No reform should create a fast pass for exploitation... Jumping the line on special consideration should only be available to firms committed to strong labor standards.

name: Yadira Rodriguez
affiliation: Construction consultant, Bronx business owner
quote: the financial burden created by the permitting fees, violation penalties, and the lengthy approval process by the numerous agencies such as Do and Oath ... their fees are incredible crazy.

name: Charles Dilone
affiliation: BACH Network (Industrial Business Service Provider for the Bronx) [org name unverified]
quote: Streamline permitting across agencies, strengthen protections for IBZ-zoned land

name: Pedro Suarez
affiliation: The Hub / Third Avenue Business Improvement District, South Bronx (Executive Director)
quote: there should be an app or web account to consolidate all of the city's permitting and licensing for small businesses ... in multiple languages is some low-hanging fruit.

name: Jerry Hyppolite
affiliation: Housing Solutions of New York (Chief of Staff and Head of Government Affairs)
quote: there's a vault section but that vault section doesn't connect back to your contract. So if you have multicontracts you still have to go to the vault versus ... it can cut across the other contracts.

name: Sadio Bah
affiliation: Bar Real Estate (broker/owner) and City Builder Development Corporation (owner); buy/fix/flip
quote: Why don't you tell me what you need ... one time when I submit it to you, you don't have to make me go back and forth.

name: Annemarie Gray
affiliation: Open New York, executive director (statewide pro-housing grassroots advocacy group)
quote: We really must take a more well-rounded view of neighborhood character... so too are the New Yorkers that live in them.

name: Michael Piccirillo
affiliation: New York City District Council of Carpenters (Director of Area Standards)
quote: When you have experienced union carpenters on site, things run smoother, safer, and faster without cutting quarters. That's not an opinion. That's just how jobs actually play out.

name: Davon Lomax
affiliation: District Council 9, International Union of Painters and Allied Trades (IUPAT) (Political Director)
quote: Skilled workforce is not an obstacle to efficiency. It is one of its foundations.

name: Diego Opperman
affiliation: Ironworkers Local 40
quote: I personally been on jobs where one old-timer sees something that eight engineers have not yet understood.

name: Michael Grunert
affiliation: IBEW Local 3 (International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers, Local Union No. 3)
quote: Build more, build faster, build better. Most importantly, build union. Building unions builds pathways. a pathway to the middle class.

name: Henry Sutherland
affiliation: IBEW Local 3 (International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers, Local Union No. 3)
quote: If we want to continue this being the great city that it is... always keep the building trades in what we're doing.

name: Christopher Loscalzo
affiliation: Laborers' Local 1010 (LIUNA - Pavers and Road Builders District Council)
quote: Project labor agreements function as a job site constitution, establishing a single set of rules and expectations across an entire project rather than relying on a piecemeal approach.

name: Aaron Beinstein
affiliation: Ironworkers Local 40
quote: No job or infrastructure project is worth more than a worker's health or their well-being.

name: Robert Joyce
affiliation: Abundance New York, Senior Policy Advisor (native Brooklynite, career public servant)
quote: make staffing decisions... for the city as a whole downstream from our overall policy desired outcomes and staff from there.

name: Cherie Chung
affiliation: Holly (hollygov.com), Co-founder & Co-CEO; govtech AI classification/compensation/hiring platform
quote: the system that we see in hiring is often slow not because of public servants but because... they don't have modern tools.

name: Cordell Schachter
affiliation: Former NYC and federal government CTO/CIO; executive in residence at the Transit Tech Lab
quote: Streamline IT hiring and workforce development via a multidisciplinary board working with state authorities, labor, academia and the private sector.

name: Honda Wang
affiliation: Ordinary New York City worker (rank-and-file civil servant), testifying in personal capacity
quote: Asking the charter commission to eliminate guardrails because of mismanagement would be the equivalent of asking the FAA to relax airline safety standards after a plane crash because of Boeing's mismanagement.

name: Zachary Thomas
affiliation: Member of the parks committee, Manhattan Community Board 3 (recently moved to Long Island City)
quote: Make it easier for Parks and other agencies to hire and retain quality candidates so resident-initiated projects actually get executed.

name: Ashley Roelofs
affiliation: Trust for Public Land (Program Coordinator)
quote: Philanthropic dollars are effectively paying banks for city-funded projects. Advancing even a portion of grant funding at the outset would solve this.

name: Felice Farber
affiliation: Subcontractors Trade Association (STA), Executive Director
quote: The city should track payment timeliness beginning on the date a payment requisition is submitted rather than measuring the period only after an agency approves payment.

name: Maurelhena Walles
affiliation: Equity Design Inc. (founder and CEO); NYC/NYS MWBE
quote: we get paid after the fact, sometimes a year after the fact ... So, I have to figure out how to be able to close that gap in my revenue so I have the cash flow that would allow me to take on big contracts.

name: Daniel Garcia
affiliation: Salsa Catering & Special Events (founder/owner/CEO); MWBE; Port Morris Industrial Business Zone, Bronx
quote: When payments are delayed for months or even years, it creates a real cash flow crisis that can threaten whole operations like salsa.

name: Gregory Hernandez
affiliation: Green Canvas Productions (founder/CEO), Bronx video production company; MBE certified, NYC DOE vendor; also founder, Bronx Independent Cinema Center
quote: Provide a payroll cash-infusion/financing mechanism for businesses in good standing

name: Julie Samuels
affiliation: Tech:NYC (President & CEO; founder); former 2025 NYC Charter Revision commissioner
quote: Reform procurement to ensure city contractors get paid

name: Charles Diamond
affiliation: Special Counsel, Mayor's Office of Contract Services (MOCS)
quote: There's no way this commission can end its work without a big part of it being procurement because it is so big.

name: Michael Hickey
affiliation: Citizens Committee for New York City (CitizensNYC), Chief of Strategy and Operations
quote: We recommend the contract administration be scaled to size and scope of funding so that community-based and hyperlocal partners are no longer excluded from competing because the administrative cost is too damn high.

name: Carl Hammersburg
affiliation: SAS Institute, Senior Manager, Government and Healthcare Risk and Fraud
quote: Just knowing that five different departments are doing business with the same company and potentially you could aggregate that contract and get a lower unit price can have a huge impact on spending.

name: Phil Wong
affiliation: New York City Council Member, 30th District, Queens (Middle Village, Maspeth, Elmhurst, Ridgewood, Glendale, Rego Park)
quote: Require cost-effectiveness reviews before signing billion-dollar contracts (e.g. emergency hotel shelters at $352/night) and tie contracts to real outcomes.

name: Jackson Chabot
affiliation: Open Plans (Director of Public Space Advocacy)
quote: We urge the commission to recommend charter changes that would allow outdoor dining to be administered through the Department of Transportation's permits and licenses rather than revocable consents.

name: Corey Hannigan
affiliation: Transportation Alternatives, Government Relations Director for Safe Streets
quote: Streamline the outdoor dining application; eliminate duplicative street-bed and sidewalk dining processes; make the program year-round

name: Andrew Rigie
affiliation: New York City Hospitality Alliance (executive director)
quote: removing the revocable consent requirement from the outdoor dining licensing process ... by removing the revocable consent you will speed up the process by months and months and months.

name: Pei Wei
affiliation: Co-owner of Zazza restaurant (Southeast Asian community, Queens); board director of a NYC restaurant group
quote: Outdoor dining actually largely become a luxury for the well-funded restaurant in a wealthy neighborhood.

name: Helen Zhang
affiliation: Owner of Ziggy's Roman Cafe, a full-service restaurant at 15 Main Street, Dumbo, Brooklyn (testified online)
quote: I spent five months fighting for the right to put tables outside my front door. Please, I would love to make sure no one else does the same.

name: Michael Kelly
affiliation: Outdoor-dining permit expediter who filed 400+ sidewalk, roadway and closed-cafe applications for clients (testified online)
quote: The main complaint is that they paid the fee and cannot operate.

name: Megan Rickerson
affiliation: Owner of Someday Bar in Boerum Hill, Brooklyn (testified online)
quote: If we're waiting six plus months to get going, think about how many restaurants and bars just missed out... So much revenue was lost from small businesses that people really, really needed.

name: Dr. Constance Barnes
affiliation: UnmaskEDU, LLC (founder); Chair, Economic Development Committee, Bronx Community Board 8
quote: Streamline the MWBE application paperwork (e.g., accommodate applicants whose landlords don't provide rent receipts)

name: Yoxagna Canaan
affiliation: Balance, Money And Mind, LLC (founder/owner), Bronx; CPA; financial literacy, bookkeeping, tax; NYC MWBE
quote: whoever earned those contract can be secured that they hire or should contract a small and micro businesses from the Bronx to ensure that those resource from New Yorkers always stay in New York.

name: Aneesa Waheed
affiliation: Tara Kitchen (founder and executive chef), Moroccan restaurant group (Tribeca + Capital Region NY); NYS 2024 SBA Small Business Person of the Year
quote: I'm really interested in micropurchasing and if that is something that could be made transparent and ... accessible to small businesses like myself. It's really the difference between us surviving and going out of business.

name: Sarah Espillat
affiliation: MWBE-certified business owner; mental health / emotional coaching services for women ages 25-55
quote: they don't consider us like ... how can we put something together that let them see us and consider us when they get these type of contracts.

name: Tristan Louis
affiliation: President & CEO of Casebook PBC, a public benefit corporation govtech (human-services case-management SaaS) company; NYC resident/technology entrepreneur
quote: Digital infrastructure is fundamentally different than any other infrastructure that exists.

name: Julie Swoope
affiliation: NYC-DSA (Tech Action) member; Mamdani technology transition committee; works on a public-sector tech team (State of Maryland)

name: Sumana Harihareswara
affiliation: Software professional (testified online); cited beta NYC and 18F

affiliation: Co-founder & CEO, B-HiTech, Inc. (operates the MineLogX AI mining platform); New York-based technology company

name: Mamadou Saliou Diallo
affiliation: President, Guinean Community of America NY-NJ-CT (GUICA)

affiliation: Founder of Neighbor First Group (helps small businesses get funding)
quote: the best funding for me is the SBA loan but it's very hard to get.

name: Mamadou Diallo
affiliation: Deputy director, Guinea-USA Chamber of Commerce
quote: what support is available for entrepreneur who face language [barriers] when navigate government services?

name: Mariame Diallo
affiliation: Owner, hair-braiding salon(s); described as secretary/director of the Guinea-USA Chamber of Commerce

name: Tim Tompkins
affiliation: NYU Marron Institute Fellow (Sustaining Places Initiative); former president, Times Square Alliance
quote: There must be adequate public sector investment in the public realm with an adequate and uni by unionized city workforce, especially with respect to both maintenance and recreation programs

name: Mark Levine
affiliation: New York City Comptroller
quote: binding Rainy Day Fund (Revenue Stabilization Fund) charter rules

name: Amanda Page-Hoongrajok
affiliation: Assistant Professor of Economics, Fashion Institute of Technology (FIT)
quote: You could have painful spending cuts happening while money is just sitting in a reserve and you're not able to use it.

name: Martin Bernstein
affiliation: Economist (testifying on revenue stabilization fund design)

name: J.W. Mason
affiliation: Associate Professor of Economics, John Jay College, CUNY (former policy director, Working Families Party)
quote: It's a little bit of a fantasy to think that you can avoid... you actually do need to have responsible people in office.

affiliation: New York City Council Member, District 6 (Manhattan); former Manhattan Borough President

name: Craig Covil
affiliation: Design-Build Institute of America (DBIA) NYC Metro Region, Chair/President; C2 Consulting LLC
quote: Design build delivers projects faster and more efficiently than design bid build... It is a tool in the toolbox.

name: Bria Donohue
affiliation: American Institute of Architects New York (AIA NY), Director of Government Affairs

name: Pascal A. Ouedraogo
affiliation: AK General Contractor Corp (Bronx); licensed general contractor (CEO)

affiliation: Founder, Victimas Directas (Bronx domestic-violence nonprofit / Women's Service Club, 501(c)(3))
quote: Create programs/licensing pathways so moms can legally run a business from home (or affordable local space) without getting ticketed

name: Mayerlyn Suarez
affiliation: Founder of a NYC small business making artisanal paletas (multicultural flavors); immigrant entrepreneur
quote: it can be difficult to know exactly what is expected ... Additional support such as educational workshops, clear checklists, multilingual resources, and easier technical assistant will make a significant difference.

name: Andrew Rasiej
affiliation: Civic Hall at Union Square (founder)
quote: Staying current isn't the project you finish, it's the permanent condition of governing from now on.

name: Julia Stoyanovich
affiliation: NYU Institute Associate Professor of Computer Science & Engineering and Data Science; founder/director, Center for Responsible AI
quote: Disclose it. Prove it works. Let people contest it. Three lines in the charter, three questions for the ballot.

name: Jessica Ariel-Wamala
affiliation: The Future Fluent (founder); formerly Principal, AI Systems & Public Benefits at Promise; Crown Heights
quote: We must stop defining AI solely by the risks and fear. And we need to start defining AI by what we hope these technologies can achieve for public good.

name: Jenessa Jules
affiliation: South Bronx small business owner (cannabis space) and analyst
quote: doing an audit of all of the different agencies and department sites could be something that would be a lowcost way to address that issue.

name: Margaret Brown
affiliation: City employee at an unnamed mayoral agency (testifying in personal capacity)

affiliation: Bronx resident; medical coder, real estate agent, software developer; founder of the Quality Time Network and Quality Time Network Foundation

affiliation: Founder of Rebel One (RBL1), investor network accelerating diverse social-impact tech founders; formerly Managing Director of Blue Ridge Labs @ Robin Hood Foundation

name: Mimi Turner
affiliation: Women's Housing and Economic Development Corporation (WHEDco), small business adviser; South Bronx community development nonprofit
quote: we urge the city to sustain and expand investment in community-based local development focused organizations like Wedco.

name: Antonio Solís

name: Michelle Minaya
affiliation: Family child care provider (5 years), Bronx

name: David Lee
affiliation: NYC Fiscal Policy Analyst, Center for New York City Affairs (The New School); researcher at Columbia (Lamont-Doherty), in personal capacity
quote: transparency and accessibility to public data are of course the paramount priorities of effective... governance.

affiliation: Mentor/advocate for incarcerated and returning citizens and their families (24 years)

name: Ashley Graber

affiliation: Founder and CEO, Grand Slam (banquet hall / event business, Bronx, 18 years; second location in Manhattan)

name: Rajesh Sankat

name: Pritya Shrimali
affiliation: Recent NYC high school graduate and New Jersey resident researching federal superfund and urban environmental remediation policy
quote: A child born in this neighborhood today will be finishing elementary school before the cleanup even begins.

name: Damien Archbold
affiliation: Anesthesiologist at Elmhurst Hospital, Queens; resident of Long Island City
quote: The state of our public spaces and roads are a public health issue.

name: Henry Smith
affiliation: Director of economic development, Long Island City Partnership / LIC Business Improvement District (testified online)
quote: It has really been a problem with not only just cases being closed immediately but also to have the follow-up.

name: India Bee
affiliation: Local beekeeper; founder of a sensory-inclusion pop-up organization; parent and disability advocate (CUNY graduate degree in disability studies)

name: Nick Guargiglia
affiliation: New York Offshore Wind Alliance (also Alliance for Clean Energy New York); advocacy manager
quote: Infrastructure delays are themselves a form of government inefficiency. When projects are slowed by fragmented planning, insufficient coordination, duplicative processes, or a lack of long-term investment, New Yorkers ultimately bear the cost.

name: Patrick Hall
affiliation: Elan Flowers (co-owner, Tribeca storefront florist since 1983)
quote: My name is Patrick Hall and my wife Christine and I own a small business called Elan Flowers in Tribeca. It's a storefront business that has been serving New York since 1983.

name: Hugh Francis
affiliation: HeyMamdaniNYC coalition (founder of Garden 3D); coalition includes Mozilla Foundation, RadicalxChange, Metagov, Decentral Park and Polis
quote: My name is Hugh Francis and I'm here on behalf of heymamdani.nyc, a coalition of New Yorkers and leading civic tech organizations who want to help this city work better. New York City can become dramatically more efficient by making its technology open and participatory to the people who live here.

name: Stacey Bode
affiliation: Parent advocate for families with disabilities (autism); online participant
quote: I'm a parent advocate for families with disabilities. The DOE and the HR departments are not talking to each other... there's not one place that has all the information. Nobody's been collecting data on this community.

name: Eric Richardson
affiliation: Former Deputy Chief Fleet Management Officer, NYC DCAS / NYC Fleet (23 years, retired July 2024)
quote: This proposal is not about correcting a failure. It is about preserving success and giving this essential function the permanence it has grown into.
